c74object.name: weaver~
c74object.digest: Writes incoming track data into a polybuffer~
c74object.description: The `weaver~` object "weaves" audio from external palette buffers into a named `polybuffer~`. It monitors an incoming time ramp signal on its first inlet. Each track loops individually based on its own length, derived as `main_ramp % track_length`. Track lengths are manually specified via a list of `[track_id, length]` on the second inlet. The object maintains a deterministic periodic schedule for each track, populated using integer multiples of the `bar_length` (derived from a `bar` buffer). When a track-specific ramp crosses a scheduled bar timestamp, the object performs a lookup in a transcript dictionary. If a corresponding entry exists, it blends that audio; if not, it automatically crossfades to silence. Transitions use sample-accurate crossfading for smooth performance.

inlet.description: Accepts an audio signal treated as the main time ramp in milliseconds. Each track derives its own looping ramp from this signal. Crossings of scheduled bar timestamps and ramp wrap-arounds on the track-specific ramps trigger audio weaving.
Accepts a two-item list consisting of a track ID (integer) and a track length (float/integer) in milliseconds. This updates the looping length for the specified track.

outlet.description: Whenever a track's individual ramp loops (including when the main ramp loops), it outputs an integer corresponding to that track ID.
Outputs diagnostic information when the log attribute is enabled.

objarg.name: dictionary
objarg.digest: Name of the dictionary to reference

objarg.name: polybuffer
objarg.digest: Name of the polybuffer~ to reference

method.name: anything
method.digest: Change transcript dictionary or set maximum tracks
method.description: Accepts a symbol to change the name of the transcript dictionary being referenced. Also accepts the message `tracks` followed by an integer to set the maximum number of tracks to process.

method.name: list
method.description: Accepts a two-item list [track_id, length] on the second inlet to set the loop length for a specific track in milliseconds.

attribute.name: visualize
attribute.description: When enabled, sends real-time crossfade ramp positions to the visualization script.

attribute.name: tracks
attribute.description: The maximum number of tracks to process from the transcript dictionary (default is 4).

attribute.name: low
attribute.description: Minimum ramp time for crossfades in milliseconds.

attribute.name: high
attribute.description: Maximum ramp time for crossfades in milliseconds.
